name: Gondola Station
unlockCondition: 5,000,000 ducats capital, Water Transportation Guild connection
calculationsAnalysis: The Gondola Station balances transportation infrastructure with service revenue. The construction cost of 1,750,000 ducats reflects the specialized docking and waiting facilities required, while the income of 17,500 ducats (1% return) represents the fees collected from gondoliers for using the station. The maintenance cost of 20,000 ducats exceeds income, creating a realistic scenario where transportation infrastructure requires subsidy but provides essential mobility services. The employment capacity of 10 represents the dispatchers, maintenance staff, and station managers. The construction time of 5 days (432000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in public transportation that enhances city mobility and accessibility, reflecting Venice's historical dependence on organized water transportation services.
shortDescription: Professional water taxi service hub offering passenger transportation throughout Venice's canals.
fullDescription: The backbone of Venice's passenger transportation system, gondola stations organize professional water taxi services throughout the canal network. Featuring multiple moorings, covered waiting areas, and dispatcher facilities, these stations ensure that transportation remains available regardless of weather or time. Operated under guild regulations, gondola stations maintain consistent service quality and pricing.
flavorText: Unlike the streets of other cities that merely connect places, our watery streets connect lives and livelihoods—and the gondolier knows every current, both of water and of gossip.

locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Water access with turning space for multiple gondolas
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Increases accessibility rating of surrounding area by 25%, creates transportation hub, generates moderate noise pollution, increases foot traffic by 20%

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian gondola station under construction, professional transportation hub, multiple mooring points being installed along extended dock, covered waiting pavilion taking shape, dispatcher's office, lantern posts for night operation, gondolier rest area, fare board framework, guild regulatory posting area, specialized loading platforms at different heights for varying water levels, construction showing guild-standard specifications, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on practical transportation infrastructure with passenger comfort elements
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian gondola station, professional water taxi hub featuring extended dock with multiple mooring points, distinctive black gondolas lined up ready for service, covered waiting pavilion with benches for passengers, dispatcher's office with fare information board, official Transportation Guild regulations posted, lanterns for night operation, small gondolier rest area, loading platforms at different heights to accommodate tides, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, gondoliers in traditional dress waiting or assisting passengers, station master coordinating departures, sense of organized water transportation system, small guild banner, passengers of various social classes waiting for service, fare notification board with official prices

soundDesign.ambientSound: Gondoliers calling, water splashing against boats, passenger conversations
soundDesign.activitySounds: Fare transactions, departure announcements, gondola poles pushing off

seasonalEffects.acqua alta: Modified boarding procedures, raised platforms used
seasonalEffects.carnival: Decorated gondolas, increased prices, higher volume
